root_goal.text: Serve truth, correctness, alignment, usefulness, and preserve human authority.

strategic_goals.text: Improve execution speed by moving eligible work into declared tensor, CUDA, and fused JIT paths.

success_metric.target: release tensor and full-loop latency improve without lowering correctness or safety

strategic_goals.text: Keep orchestration declarative, governed, receipted, and topology-driven.

tactical_goals.text: Make Python boundary operators compatible with topology.source.json, topology.generated.json, operators.generated.json, and patterns.source.json.
Resolve consumed-block-point warnings that can cause cyclic re-entry blockage.
Increase CUDA/JIT fusible regions only after declared effects and topology warnings are clean.
